MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Gloria Cardona-Henry; plaintiff in pro per, appearing on their own behalf.
Marnin Weinreb; Weinreb Law Group; 323-688-1886; appearing for defendants Kaufman Dolowich & Voluck, LLP, Ashley Klein, Jaimie Bombard, and Lauren Jones.

Patrice Binaisa, Certified Spanish Interpreter #301593.

Plaintiff states that she did not see the court's tentative ruling. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS ASHLEY KLEIN, LAUREN JONES, KAUFMAN DOLOWICH & VOLUCK, LLP AND JAIMIE BOMBARD'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED. Moving party carried its burden. No opposition filed.

Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-16-2023 Continued To Feb-24-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Gloria Cardona-Henry; plaintiff in pro per, appearing on their own behalf.

DEFENDANTS ASHLEY KLEIN, LAUREN JONES, KAUFMAN DOLOWICH & VOLUCK, LLP AND JAIMIE BOMBARD'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is continued to February 24, 2023 on Court's own motion.
